description_long: This is a modern, freestanding shelving unit featuring three open rectangular shelves framed by two vertical wooden side panels. The shelves themselves are a smooth, light gray or white material, contrasting with the natural wood finish of the side supports. The design is minimalist, with clean lines and no visible hardware or handles, giving it a contemporary aesthetic. The open front and back allow for easy access to stored items, while the sides provide structural support and a touch of warmth from the wood. The shelves are evenly spaced, making it suitable for storing books, decorative objects, or small urban essentials. Its compact footprint and neutral color palette make it versatile for use in urban environments such as lobbies, offices, or residential entryways.
description: A modern, freestanding shelving unit with three open shelves framed by light wood side panels and smooth, light-colored shelves. Its minimalist design and open structure make it suitable for versatile urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the vertical wooden panels and the thin profile of the shelves.
description_view_1: Front view displaying three open shelves with a clean, minimalist appearance and no visible handles.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the vertical wooden panels and shelf edges.
description_view_3: Rear view revealing the open backs of the shelves and the supporting wood frame.
